label: Moving coordinate
equation: xi = x - vt
role: Defines the laser-attached frame used for geometric stationarity.

label: Symmetry reconstruction
equation: W(t) = 2 max_{Omega_m(t)} y, V_full(t) = 2 V_half(t)
role: Converts the half-domain simulation into full-width and full-volume proxies.

label: Reduced geometric descriptors
equation: L_f = max xi - xi_l, L_r = xi_l - min xi, H = z_max - z_min
role: Defines the free-boundary state extracted from the point-cloud envelope.

label: Asymmetric ellipsoid baseline
equation: ((xi-xi_c)/a_s)^2 + (y/b)^2 + ((z-z_c)/c)^2 = 1, a_s = a_f if xi >= xi_c else a_r
role: Six-parameter baseline geometry.

label: Asymmetric superellipsoid
role: Nine-parameter selected algebraic descriptor.

label: Superellipsoid full volume
equation: V = 4(a_f+a_r) b c Gamma(1+1/n) Gamma(1+1/m) Gamma(1+1/p)/Gamma(1+1/n+1/m+1/p)
role: Closed-form volume used in the geometry error calculation.

label: Heat-transport scale
equation: rho c_p (partial T/partial t + v partial T/partial xi) = k nabla^2 T + Q
role: Physics-inspired balance used to motivate dimensionless groups.

label: Dimensionless groups
equation: Pe=vL_ref/alpha, Fo=alpha t/L_ref^2, Ste=c_p(T_l-T_s)/L_fus, E*=eta P/[rho c_p v r_b^2(T_l-T0)]
role: Post-processing nondimensional scale diagnostics; not solver-parameter verification.

label: Diagonal attractor
equation: dq_i/dt = k_i(q_inf,i - q_i)
role: Selected baseline dynamics.

label: Coupled ridge attractor
equation: dq/dt = A(q_inf - q)
role: Coupled negative-control diagnostic.

label: Attractor stability criterion
equation: Re(lambda_j(-A)) < 0
role: Determines local stability of the coupled linear attractor.

label: Modeling error decomposition
equation: E_total = E_reconstruction + E_geometry + E_volume_proxy + E_dynamics + E_parameter_scale
role: Organizes uncertainty sources for the reduced-order modeling chain.

label: Boundary projection error
equation: epsilon_M(t)=inf_{theta in Theta} d_H(Gamma(t), M(theta))
role: Defines the Hausdorff-type projection distance from the observed boundary to the analytic manifold.

label: Diagonal attractor Lyapunov function
equation: V(q)=1/2 ||q-q_inf||_2^2, dV/dt <= -2 k_min V
role: Provides the v4 exponential stability proof for the selected dynamics.

label: Semi-formal total error-budget inequality
equation: E_total <= C1 E_reconstruction + C2 E_geometry + C3 E_volume_proxy + C4 E_dynamics + C5 E_parameter_scale
role: Uses sensitivity weights to interpret the diagnostic error budget without claiming a sharp worst-case bound.

label: Moving heat equation with latent heat
equation: rho c_p(T)(partial_t T + u dot nabla T) = nabla dot (k(T)nabla T) + Q_laser + Q_powder - rho L_fus partial_t f_l
role: States the high-dimensional thermal starting point before observation and reduction.

label: Stefan condition
equation: rho L_fus v_n = [k nabla T dot n]_s^l
role: Defines the phase-boundary energy balance that motivates the free-boundary viewpoint.

label: Free-surface heat loss
equation: -k nabla T dot n = h_c(T-T_inf)+epsilon_rad sigma_SB(T^4-T_inf^4)
role: Represents convective and radiative heat loss from the melt-pool free surface.

label: Marangoni shear condition
equation: tau n dot t = (d sigma/dT) grad_s T dot t
role: Connects temperature gradients to tangential surface stress and boundary deformation.

label: Molten-region observation operator
equation: P^h(t)=O_h[Omega_m(t),T,u]
role: Makes explicit that the data are an observation of the molten region rather than the full physical state.

label: Observed-boundary modeling chain
equation: full Stefan-Marangoni problem -> O_h -> xi-frame Gamma_h(t) -> Pi_M Gamma_h(t) -> q(t) -> dq/dt
role: Summarizes the observation-to-descriptor modeling chain without claiming a closed-form PDE reduction.

label: First-order relaxation approximation
equation: dq/dt = F(q) approx J(q-q_inf), with J approx -diag(k_i)
role: Motivates the diagonal attractor as a first-order local model near the quasi-steady state.

label: Regime-invariance check
equation: class(Pe,Ste,E*,Ma) remains unchanged under the prescribed perturbation set
role: Links nondimensional sensitivity to assumption robustness.

label: Implicit boundary level set
equation: Phi(x;theta)=|(xi-xi_c)/a_s|^n+|y/b|^m+|(z-z_c)/c|^p
role: Defines the analytic boundary manifold used for projection and residual calculation.

label: Boundary projection objective
equation: theta*(t)=argmin_theta N_b^{-1} sum_{x_j in Gamma_h(t)} (Phi(x_j;theta)-1)^2
role: Makes the superellipsoid fitting operation explicit as a constrained manifold projection.

label: Geometry diagnostic errors
equation: epsilon_Gamma=[N_b^{-1} sum(Phi(x_j;theta*)-1)^2]^{1/2}, epsilon_V=|V_M-V_full|/(V_full+delta_V)
role: Defines the boundary and volume errors used for model selection.

label: Diagonal trajectory fit
equation: min_{q_inf,i in Q_i,k_i>=0} sum_{r in T_tr} [q_inf,i+(q_i(t_0)-q_inf,i) exp(-k_i(t_r-t_0))-q_i(t_r)]^2
role: States how the selected diagonal attractor state and rate are fitted directly to the training trajectory.

label: Coupled ridge identification
equation: A*=argmin_A sum_{r in T_tr} ||dot q_r-A(q_inf-q_r)||_2^2+lambda_R||A||_F^2
role: States the regularized identification problem for the coupled overparameterization check.

label: State-wise validation relative RMSE
equation: rRMSE_j = [N_val^{-1} sum_{r in T_val}(qhat_j(t_r)-q_j(t_r))^2]^{1/2}/(range(q_j)+delta_j)
role: Defines the normalized validation metric used to compare diagonal and coupled dynamics.

label: Weighted total error-budget inequality
equation: E_total <= C_R E_reconstruction + C_Gamma E_geometry + C_V E_volume + C_D E_dynamics + C_P E_parameter
role: Links the diagnostic error taxonomy to sensitivity-weighted uncertainty accounting.
